name: SPL-OWASP-A01-Broken-Access-Control
description: Detects unauthorized access attempts to restricted/administrative paths and directory traversal patterns (OWASP A01: Broken Access Control). Mapped to MITRE ATT&CK T1190 (Initial Access).
search:
index=* (sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=docker* OR source=*nginx* OR source=*apache*) 
| eval src_ip=coalesce(clientip, src_ip, src), uri=coalesce(uri, uri_path, url), http_method=coalesce(method, http_method) 
| search uri="*/admin*" OR uri="*.env*" OR uri="*.git*" OR uri="*/api/v1/users/*" OR uri="*/config*" OR uri="*../*" OR uri="*..%2F*" 
| stats count, values(status) as status by src_ip, uri, http_method, host, index 
| where status=403 OR status=401 OR (status=200 AND match(uri, "(?i)(admin|\.env|\.git|config|\.\.)")) 
| eval attack_type="OWASP A01: Broken Access Control", severity="High", risk_score=85, dest="millibluesec.online", time_formatted=strftime(now(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), recommendation="Verify RBAC policies. Restrict access to administrative endpoints and sensitive files. Block IP if malicious behavior persists." 
| fields src_ip, dest, uri, http_method, severity, time_formatted, host, index, attack_type, recommendation
